channel.title: Home Theater Geeks (Video)
channel.itunes:author: TWiT
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons License - Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International - http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/
channel.itunes:subtitle: Get the best picture on your screen, improve your sound, and supercharge your home theater experience.
channel.itunes:summary:
Get the most out of your home theater with the latest advances, product reviews, and all things audio and video. Every Thursday, Scott Wilkinson shares his expertise, energy, and enthusiasm about how to make your A/V system sound and look its best. In this short-format podcast, Scott brings you news, reviews, interviews, and commentary, and answers your questions. Submit your home theater queries through email at HTG@twit.tv or via TWiT's social media. You might hear your question answered on the show! You can join Club TWiT for $10 per month and get ad-free audio and video feeds for all our shows plus everything else the club offers...or get just this podcast ad-free for $5 per month.
New episodes every Thursday.
channel.description:
Get the most out of your home theater with the latest advances, product reviews, and all things audio and video. Every Thursday, Scott Wilkinson shares his expertise, energy, and enthusiasm about how to make your A/V system sound and look its best. In this short-format podcast, Scott brings you news, reviews, interviews, and commentary, and answers your questions. Submit your home theater queries through email at HTG@twit.tv or via TWiT's social media. You might hear your question answered on the show! You can join Club TWiT for $10 per month and get ad-free audio and video feeds for all our shows plus everything else the club offers...or get just this podcast ad-free for $5 per month.
New episodes every Thursday.
channel.itunes:keywords: TWiT, Technology, Home Theater, TV, LCD TV, Plasma TV, Surround Sound

item.title: HTG 522: What's Up With Vizio TVs? - What Happened After Walmart's Acquisition?
item.itunes:title: What's Up With Vizio TVs?
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: What Happened After Walmart's Acquisition?
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
Brad Marman wonders what's up with Vizio TVs these days? Are they still around? Are they still good quality and value? Scott Wilkinson has some answers, but other answers are hard to come by.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

item.title: HTG 521: Texas Triumph - Home Theater of the Month Interview!
item.itunes:title: Texas Triumph
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Home Theater of the Month Interview!
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
Kurt Dorsey built a stunning home theater, literally from the ground up, almost entirely with his own hands. It's a real testament to what can be done DIY, especially when you design and build the room from scratch.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Guest: Kurt Dorsey

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

Sponsor:

  • helixsleep.com/theater

item.title: HTG 520: A/V Career Advice - Breaking Into the Field in an Age of AI & Automation
item.itunes:title: A/V Career Advice
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Breaking Into the Field in an Age of AI & Automation
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
Mason Parker is considering a career move into AV installation/integration. He wonders how Scott Wilkinson got into the industry and what advice Scott might give to further a career in home theater. There are plenty of things to talk about here!

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

item.title: HTG 519: ISF Dark vs Filmmaker Mode - Are These Settings Any Different?
item.itunes:title: ISF Dark vs Filmmaker Mode
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Are These Settings Any Different?
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
Christopher Patrick asks about the difference between ISF Dark and Filmmaker picture modes, especially when the TV is used in a mostly dark room. Scott Wilkinson has the answer.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

item.title: HTG 518: MEMS Speaker Technology - A Different Type of Speaker Driver
item.itunes:title: MEMS Speaker Technology
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: A Different Type of Speaker Driver
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
Speaker drivers haven't changed much in the last 100 years, but they have certain drawbacks, especially in small form factors such as earbuds. A company called SonicEdge is developing a new type of driver that takes a completely different approach. CEO and co-founder Moti Margalit talks about his company's innovations with Scott Wilkinson.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Guest: Moti Margalit

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

item.title: HTG 517: Sacramento Sanctuary - Home Theater of the Month Interview!
item.itunes:title: Sacramento Sanctuary
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Home Theater of the Month Interview!
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
Home-theater owner Joe Klusnick joins Scott Wilkinson to talk about his home theater. He talks about the process of remodeling a room in his Sacramento home as a dedicated theater, and we get a video tour of the finished project—well, as finished as any home theater is; there's always future upgrades!

Joe's Build Thread - https://www.avsforum.com/threads/what-would-you-do-starting-over-with-a-19x21x9-dedicated-room.2110346/

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Guest: Joe Klusnick

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

Sponsor:

  • helixsleep.com/theater

item.title: HTG 516: CES 2026 Part 3 - Audio Products You Need to HEAR About
item.itunes:title: CES 2026 Part 3
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Audio Products You Need to HEAR About
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
In addition to video products, there was no shortage of audio electronics being introduced at CES 2026. With great notes from Mike Heiss, Scott Wilkinson talks about a few of the audio announcements.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

item.title: HTG 515: CES 2026 Part 2 - New TVs From TCL, LG, Samsung, Sharp, & More!
item.itunes:title: CES 2026 Part 2
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: New TVs From TCL, LG, Samsung, Sharp, & More!
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
At CES 2026, RGB mini and micro LED backlights were the big TV story, but that doesn't mean there weren't plenty of other video products being introduced. Scott Wilkinson talks about what Michael Heiss saw on the show floor.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

item.title: HTG 514: CES 2026 Part 1 - RGB LED
item.itunes:title: CES 2026 Part 1
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: RGB LED
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
The big TV news at CES 2026 was the explosion of RGB mini and micro LED backlights in LCD TVs. All the major manufacturers had examples in their booths. Scott Wilkinson talks with Michael Heiss, who braved the crowds to catch a glimpse at the new display technology.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Guest: Michael Heiss

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

Sponsor:

  • helixsleep.com/theater

item.title: HTG 513: ATSC 3.0 - The Next Generation of OTA TV
item.itunes:title: ATSC 3.0
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: The Next Generation of OTA TV
item.itunes:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
item.description:
The next generation of over-the-air TV is ATSC 3.0, also known as NextGen TV. Michael Heiss talks with Scott Wilkinson about what it is, how it works, how you can get it, and why it's important.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Guest: Michael Heiss

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Guest: Michael Heiss

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.
item.content:encoded:
The next generation of over-the-air TV is ATSC 3.0, also known as NextGen TV. Michael Heiss talks with Scott Wilkinson about what it is, how it works, how you can get it, and why it's important.

Host: Scott Wilkinson

Guest: Michael Heiss

Download or subscribe to Home Theater Geeks at https://twit.tv/shows/home-theater-geeks

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

media:content.media:title: HTG 513: ATSC 3.0 - The Next Generation of OTA TV
media:content.media:description: The Next Generation of OTA TV
media:content.media:keywords: Home theater podcast, home theater geeks, scott wilkinson, home theater setup, Home cinema, Home theater design, surround sound, av receivers, Home theater speakers, Soundproofing, Movie room design, Home theater installation, projectors, 4K TVs
